name: Harvest Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 can (7 1/2 oz) Hunt's Whole Tomatoes, drained and crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, sauté onions in oil until tender.
2. Stir in the remaining ingredients except milk and cornstarch.
3. Boil and simmer uncovered for 10 minutes.
4. In a cup, mix milk and cornstarch.
5. Add to soup and stir constantly.
6. Continue boiling until slightly thickened.
